Is a pop tart a ravioli?

If your life had a loading screen, what helpful tip would it show?
You think your stomach has ever been genuinely proud of you?
What's the most unhinged thing you do that you've just decided is normal?
If your intrusive thoughts had a batting average, what are we looking at?

What's something you pretend to like because you said you liked it once in 2014 and now it's too late to go back?
If confidence was sold at a gas station, which flavor are you grabbing?
You ever look at a goose and think 'that thing has never once questioned its purpose'?
What would your eulogy sound like if your group chat wrote it?

What's a decision you made drunk that turned out to be philosophically correct?
If your life had a theme song that played every time you walked into a room, what would it be?
What's something you used to be absolutely sure about but aren't anymore?
If you had to describe yourself using only three questions (not answers), what would they be?

What's something you're afraid of that has nothing to do with physical danger?
If your life so far was a book, what would this chapter be called?

You ever think about how your dog has absolutely no idea what country he lives in?
If your browser history became a TED talk, what would the title be?
What's the most confident you've ever been while being completely wrong?
